five_layer_learning.real_commercial_usecase: Run 2.10 continues the same commercial PPT design usecase rather than advancing to Run 3.0.
five_layer_learning.multimodal_tutorial_case_database: Run 2.10 consumes the existing tutorial/case/video-derived learning through run2_10_visual_system_sources.json.
five_layer_learning.design_memory: run2_10_visual_system_memory.json turns derived observations into visual-system contracts: editorial cinema, product theater, typographic field, kinetic demo, and non-rectangular proof.
five_layer_learning.skill_workflow: run2_10_visual_system_gate_matrix.json requires per-role source ids, memory ids, actual code module ids, shape budgets, sameness probes, and asymmetry or whitespace rules.
five_layer_learning.code_generated_native_ppt: run2_10_full_skill generated native editable PPT shapes and records actual drawRun210 visual-system module calls in trace_manifest.json.

qa_summary.generator_run: passed; self-check enforced required modules and shape/text budgets
qa_summary.browser_viewer_check: passed; latest run is 2.10, four-arm view, sheets, full-series, Data / Skill, and console errors were checked
qa_summary.trace_truthfulness_guard: passed; run2_10_code_module_ids are populated from actual visualModuleIds captured during rendering

visual_learning.useful_delta: Run 2.10 full uses structural asymmetry, visible whitespace, product theater, non-rectangular proof paths, kinetic sequence objects, and a cinematic climax; it is not merely recolored Run 2.9 rectangles.
visual_learning.what_data_changed: The data layer moved from visual primitive repairs to explicit visual-system sources, visual-system memory, and a gate matrix with shape budgets and sameness failure probes.
visual_learning.gemini_four_arm_summary: Gemini judged Run 2.10 full as the clear four-arm winner and credited structural asymmetry, whitespace, non-rectangular proof paths, and product theater rather than a palette-only change.
visual_learning.gemini_full_series_caution: Gemini judged Run 2.10 as still not highly visually distinguishable from Runs 2.7, 2.8, and 2.9 in the full-skill series because the black/orange palette, rectangle-led containers, and box-and-arrow language still repeat.
visual_learning.remaining_visual_gap: The result is still public blocked: the four-arm result improved, but the full-skill series shows that typography, spacing, and especially climax editorial composition need another same-stage thickening pass before public-video-grade claims.

control_boundary.prompt_only: commercial_case_only; all Run 2.10 visual-system source, memory, and gate inputs are forbidden
control_boundary.run1_5_skill: commercial_case_plus_run1_5_only; all Run 2.10 visual-system source, memory, and gate inputs are forbidden
control_boundary.bad_visual_system_memory: commercial_case_plus_visual_system_sources_only; visual-system memory and gate matrix are forbidden

next_required_action: Review whether Run 2.10 is visually distinct enough from Runs 2.7-2.9, then continue the same five layers by thickening source/tutorial/video decomposition, visual-system memory specificity, workflow gates, typography, spacing, and climax editorial composition.
